name: Quantum

values.name: expectedValue

values.type: Ket.Ket (ComplexNumbers.ComplexNumber Basics.Float) -> HermitianMatrix.HermitianMatrix Basics.Float -> Result.Result String.String (Real.Real Basics.Float)

values.name: probabilityOfState
values.comment: Calculate the probability of end state, the Bra.Bra, with given start state, the Ket.Ket
values.type: RowVector.InnerProductSpace a -> Ket.Ket a -> Bra.Bra a -> Result.Result String.String a
